Goal model: Need targets in order Red→Orange→Blue→Green matching bottom panel. Currently Green→Blue→Orange→Red (reversed).

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# First, let's RIGHT to restore original state
action(['RIGHT'])

seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("After RIGHT:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ['N', 'b', 'O', 'R'] and n['pixels'] >= 4:
        min_row = min(p[0] for p in n['boundary'])
        if min_row < 54:
            rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
            cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
            print(f"  {n['color']}: rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")

# Check player
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'M' and n['pixels'] == 18:
        rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
        cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
        print(f"Player: rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
